programme.title: Drive Tv
programme.desc: (G) The ever popular Mini has been fully electrified, which is all the excuse Emma needs to go for a spirited cross-country drive to a racetrack.

programme.title: Drive Tv
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv: Vehicle Insights
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv
programme.desc: (G) Trent takes the new luxury Mercedes EQS 53 AMG all electric, on a fun run through NSW, and spends the night at a lodge befitting a luxury coupe.
